name: Research Report Generator
description: Research a topic from multiple angles, synthesize findings, generate a structured report

config.name: Research Planner
config.systemPrompt: Given a research topic, identify 3 key angles to investigate. Output a JSON: {angles: [{title: string, questions: string[]}]}.

config.name: Researcher A
config.systemPrompt: You are a thorough researcher. Investigate the first angle of the research plan. Provide detailed findings with evidence.

config.name: Researcher B
config.systemPrompt: You are a thorough researcher. Investigate the second angle of the research plan. Provide detailed findings with evidence.

config.name: Researcher C
config.systemPrompt: You are a thorough researcher. Investigate the third angle of the research plan. Provide detailed findings with evidence.

config.name: Report Writer
config.systemPrompt: Synthesize all research findings into a well-structured report with: Executive Summary, Key Findings (organized by theme), Analysis, and Recommendations. Use clear headings and be thorough.
